Table of Contents

Item 1. Business Item 1A. Risk Factors Item 1B. Unresolved Staff Comments Item 1C. Cybersecurity Item 7. Management Discussion Item 8. Financial Statements

Item 1. Business

Microsoft develops and supports software, services, devices, and solutions worldwide.

Our segments include Productivity and Business Processes, Intelligent Cloud, and More Personal Computing.

Item 1A. Risk Factors

Our business is subject to intense competition and rapid technological change.

Cybersecurity incidents could harm our reputation and financial results.

Item 1B. Unresolved Staff Comments

None.

Item 1C. Cybersecurity

We maintain a comprehensive cybersecurity program overseen by management and the board.

Item 2. Properties

Our corporate headquarters are located in Redmond, Washington.

Item 7. Management's Discussion and Analysis

Revenue increased driven by cloud services and Office 365 subscriptions.

Operating income grew due to improved gross margin in Intelligent Cloud.

Item 7A. Quantitative and Qualitative Disclosures About Market Risk

We are exposed to foreign currency, interest rate, and equity price risks.

Item 8. Financial Statements and Supplementary Data

Consolidated statements of income, comprehensive income, balance sheets, and cash flows follow.

Report of independent registered public accounting firm included herein.
